items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Last-write-wins vs merge conflict'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API interactions or results that confirm this behavior is supported or leads to a clear failure report. The linked use case and prior steps do not provide relevant data to assess the outcome of this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
